content: Start the concept note interview for Porto Alegre. Use the /concept-note skill flow. Always use the ask_user tool for multiple-choice questions instead of writing them as text.
Starting concept note preparation. Let me load the knowledge base.
Good — template loaded. Now loading all Porto Alegre knowledge files in parallel.
All city files loaded. Creating run folder and advancing to Phase 1.
Municipality and state auto-filled. Now the 4 Phase 1 questions:
All 4 Phase 1 questions are up in the panel. Municipality (**Porto Alegre**) and state (**Rio Grande do Sul**) are already filled in the document. Waiting for your selections before moving on.
All 4 Phase 1 questions are up in the panel. Municipality (**Porto Alegre**) and state (**Rio Grande do Sul**) are already filled in the document. Waiting for your selections before moving on.
Soluções Baseadas na Natureza (NBS); Ambos; Super porto alegre; Prefeitura de Porto Alegre (SMAMUS)
Phase 1 ✅ — now moving to Phase 2 and auto-filling context from city knowledge.
Contexto territorial e diagnóstico auto-preenchidos. Now the Phase 2 questions:
Phase 2 questions are up. The document panel now shows the **territorial context** and **problem diagnosis** pre-filled from Porto Alegre's climate data. Waiting for your selections.
Phase 2 questions are up. The document panel now shows the **territorial context** and **problem diagnosis** pre-filled from Porto Alegre's climate data. Waiting for your selections.

Baixadas de Humaitá-Navegantes e Ilhas; Aprovar o diagnóstico como está; Aumentar a resiliência climática urbana de Porto Alegre por meio de soluções baseadas na natureza que reduzam o risco de cheias, mitigando o efeito de ilha de calor e sequestro de carbono
Phase 2 ✅ — moving to Phase 3. Now asking solution design questions based on the intervention knowledge base:

Phase 3 questions are live. The knowledge base has **wetland restoration**, **flood parks**, and **green corridors** data loaded — costs, KPIs, and Brazilian precedents (Curitiba, Recife, Bogotá) are all ready to auto-populate once you confirm the intervention type and scale.

Phase 3 questions are live. The knowledge base has **wetland restoration**, **flood parks**, and **green corridors** data loaded — costs, KPIs, and Brazilian precedents (Curitiba, Recife, Bogotá) are all ready to auto-populate once you confirm the intervention type and scale.
continue
Now auto-filling objectives and indicators, then moving to Phase 4:
Phase 3 ✅ — loading co-benefits data for Phase 4.
Now auto-filling all benefit sections:
Phase 4 benefits are filled in the document — CO₂, flood, heat, jobs. Two questions up for your validation.
Phase 4 benefits are filled in the document — CO₂, flood, heat, jobs. Two questions up for your validation.
Aprovar as estimativas como estão; Foco nas comunidades de baixa renda de Humaitá-Navegantes e Ilhas
Now auto-filling institutional and plan alignment sections from the knowledge base:
Institutional sections are filled — stakeholder table, internal coordination, plan alignment. Three Phase 5 questions are up now.
Institutional sections are filled — stakeholder table, internal coordination, plan alignment. Three Phase 5 questions are up now.
